name: refgate
description: Use the Refgate CLI to gate manuscript references, BibTeX provenance, source PDFs, and citation evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Gate BibTeX provenance and citation evidence.
interface.longDescription: Use Refgate CLI workflows to bootstrap ordinary TeX/BibTeX manuscripts, resolve source provenance, review claim-to-source evidence, catch source-title mismatches, and produce standalone audit artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap Refgate for this TeX/BibTeX paper.
Audit this manuscript bibliography and claim evidence.
Run Refgate paper-audit and follow the next actions.
